name: the-war-of-art
description:
Steven Pressfield's The War of Art — an executable toolkit for overcoming creative resistance, defeating procrastination, and doing the work that matters most.

Covers 5 use cases:
① Overcoming Resistance — recognize and defeat the internal force blocking creative work
② Becoming a Professional — adopt the mindset, habits, and discipline of a professional creative
③ The Creative Process — navigate the stages of creation from inspiration to completion
④ Winning the Inner Battle — defeat self-sabotage, fear, and the ego
⑤ Turning Pro — transition from amateur to professional in any creative field.

Trigger when users say: "Creative block" "Overcoming resistance" "Steven Pressfield" "War of Art" "How to be creative" "Procrastination" "Creative fear" "Self-sabotage" "How to start creating" "Beat procrastination" "Creative discipline" "Do the work" "Show up every day"
or mention: Steven Pressfield / War of Art / Resistance / turning pro / creative block / muse / procrastination.

Related skills: the-creative-act, big-magic, the-happiness-advantage, atomic-habits, the-slight-edge.
useCase: Helps creatives of all types overcome the internal Resistance that blocks meaningful work and transition from amateur to professional mindset.
knownRisks: Pressfield's framework is intentionally blunt; some may find it harsh, but the directness is part of its effectiveness.
